Stress experienced outside of Strain activities and sleep.

article_list.title: WHAT IS STRESS?
article_list.paragraph: Stress measures how alert and activated your body is. Stress isn’t always something to avoid - it can be used to help you achieve your goals.

article_list.title: MEASURING STRESS
article_list.paragraph: WHOOP measures stress on a scale of 0-3 using motion, HRV and heart rate. The higher your score, the more activated you are.

article_list.title: PHYSICAL STRESS
article_list.paragraph: Your body may experience more stress during and after exercise. This is normal — your body is working hard to match your needs and recover.

article_list.title: MENTAL STRESS
article_list.paragraph: Everyone has different mental triggers for stress. Stress Monitor helps you identify triggers and build more resilience towards them.

article_list.title: CONTROL YOUR STRESS
article_list.paragraph: Try a breathwork exercise to make you more alert or calm you down, depending on your goals.

article_list.title: YOU'RE ALL SET
article_list.paragraph: Find this information and more anytime by tapping the “i” at the top of the page.

onboarding_dismiss_dialogue.body_display: You can learn more about Stress Monitor by tapping the info button next to the result
